narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for AI chips and related infrastructure remains robust, driving strong performance for companies enabling the AI revolution.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
NVDA revenue growth slows below 20% QoQ
China export controls expand to HBM

sources.title: Nvidia can deliver chips — but it can’t buy Big Tech out of its credit and power-grid crisis

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The strong demand for GLP-1 obesity and diabetes drugs continues to drive significant revenue growth and market excitement for pharmaceutical companies leading in this space.
watchFor: New competitors with superior efficacy or fewer side effects emerge
Insurance coverage for GLP-1 drugs becomes more restrictive
Unexpected safety concerns arise for existing GLP-1 medications

sources.title: Eli Lilly vs. Merck: Which Pharma Stock Looks Stronger Now?

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are increasingly adopting AI-powered software and cloud solutions, boosting revenue for key platform providers and cybersecurity firms.
watchFor: Microsoft/Google Cloud revenue growth decelerates significantly
Enterprise IT spending surveys show AI budget cuts
Increased regulatory scrutiny on AI models

sources.title: Anthropic, Microsoft in talks for AI chip deal after $5 billion investment

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Major internet platforms continue to dominate digital advertising and content consumption, benefiting from strong user engagement and advertiser spending.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in digital ad spending reported by major agencies
User engagement metrics decline across key platforms
New privacy regulations impacting ad targeting effectiveness

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical tensions continue to drive increased defense spending, benefiting aerospace and defense contractors.
watchFor: Significant budget cuts announced by major defense departments
De-escalation of current global conflicts
Supply chain disruptions for critical defense components

narratives.name: Credit Services Strength
narratives.thesis: Strong consumer spending and robust payment volumes continue to benefit credit services companies.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in consumer spending
Increase in credit card delinquencies
New regulations impacting interchange fees

narratives.name: Semiconductor Equipment Expansion
narratives.thesis: The ongoing buildout of semiconductor manufacturing capacity, driven by AI and other advanced technologies, is fueling demand for equipment and materials.
watchFor: Major chipmakers announce capex reductions
Geopolitical tensions disrupt supply chains for materials
Global chip inventory levels rise unexpectedly

narratives.name: Computer Hardware Demand
narratives.thesis: Strong demand for high-performance computing hardware, particularly servers and components for AI data centers, continues to drive growth.
watchFor: Corporate IT spending surveys show deceleration
Increased competition from white-box server manufacturers
Component supply chain bottlenecks ease, leading to price pressure

narratives.name: Entertainment Content Consumption
narratives.thesis: Demand for diverse entertainment content remains high, benefiting streaming services and content creators.
watchFor: Increased churn rates for major streaming platforms
Content production costs escalate beyond revenue growth
New competitors gain significant market share

narratives.name: E-commerce Resilience
narratives.thesis: Despite broader consumer pressures, e-commerce platforms continue to demonstrate resilience, benefiting from ongoing digital adoption and convenience.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in online retail sales growth
Increased competition from brick-and-mortar stores
Higher shipping costs impacting profitability

narratives.name: Healthcare Plans Stability
narratives.thesis: Healthcare plans are demonstrating stability, navigating regulatory environments and managing costs effectively.
watchFor: Unexpected increases in medical loss ratios
Significant changes in government healthcare policy
Increased competition leading to pricing pressure

narratives.name: Discount Stores Stability
narratives.thesis: Discount stores continue to see stable demand as consumers seek value amidst ongoing inflationary pressures.
watchFor: Significant reduction in inflation rates
Consumers shift spending towards premium brands
Increased competition from online retailers

sources.title: People are putting less gas in their tanks as high prices crimp budgets, Walmart says

narratives.name: Apparel Retail Headwinds
narratives.thesis: High inflation and reduced discretionary spending are creating headwinds for apparel retailers, as consumers prioritize essential goods.
watchFor: CPI for apparel turns negative MoM
Stronger than expected earnings from apparel retailers
Significant promotional activity indicating inventory issues

sources.title: People are putting less gas in their tanks as high prices crimp budgets, Walmart says

narratives.name: Gold Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Gold is on watch as an inflation hedge and safe haven, but its performance is sensitive to real interest rates and dollar strength.
watchFor: 10-year real yield drops below 1%
Significant increase in geopolitical instability
Dollar index (DXY) breaks below 98

sources.title: PPI for final demand advances 1.4% in April; services rise 1.2%, goods increase 2.0%
CPI for all items rises 0.6% in April; shelter and gasoline up

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified AI Adoption
narratives.thesis: Diversified banks are increasingly adopting AI to enhance efficiency and customer service, positioning them for long-term operational improvements.
watchFor: Significant increase in non-performing loans
Unexpected regulatory hurdles for AI implementation in banking
Cybersecurity breaches related to AI systems

narratives.name: Utilities - Independent Power Producers Growth
narratives.thesis: Independent power producers are positioned for growth driven by increasing electricity demand, particularly from data centers and industrial expansion.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in industrial or data center power demand
New regulatory caps on electricity prices
Unexpected operational outages at power plants

narratives.name: Logistics Operational Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Integrated freight and logistics companies continue to face operational headwinds, including labor costs and fluctuating demand, impacting profitability.
watchFor: Significant drop in fuel prices
Improvement in global supply chain efficiency
Stronger than expected e-commerce growth boosting package volumes

narratives.name: Medical Devices Under Pressure
narratives.thesis: The medical devices sector faces ongoing pressure from supply chain issues, regulatory hurdles, and potential pricing scrutiny.
watchFor: Easing of global supply chain constraints
Increased elective procedure volumes
Favorable regulatory approvals for new devices

narratives.name: Asset Management Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Asset managers are on watch as market volatility and rising bond yields could impact asset under management and fee generation.
watchFor: Sustained equity market rally boosting AUM
Significant outflows from actively managed funds
Regulatory changes impacting fee structures

sources.title: Your bond portfolio is facing a ‘termite’ infestation far worse than Jamie Dimon’s ‘cockroaches’
BCA says the stock and bond markets 'are on a collision course.' And bonds may win

narratives.name: Residential Construction Watchlist
narratives.thesis: The residential construction sector is on watch, with high interest rates impacting affordability, but potential for underlying demand to support activity.
watchFor: Mortgage rates drop below 6%
Housing starts data shows sustained decline
Builder sentiment index improves significantly

sources.title: I’m selling my $1 million home. Will my agent really charge less than a 6% commission?

narratives.name: Utilities - Renewable Watchlist
narratives.thesis: The renewable utilities sector is on watch, as high interest rates increase the cost of capital for new projects, potentially slowing development.
watchFor: Interest rates decline significantly, lowering project financing costs
New federal or state incentives for renewable energy development
Technological breakthroughs reducing renewable energy costs

narratives.name: Farm & Heavy Construction Machinery Watchlist
narratives.thesis: The sector is on watch for shifts in agricultural commodity prices and infrastructure spending, which could impact demand for heavy machinery.
watchFor: Government announces new large-scale infrastructure projects
Global agricultural commodity prices decline sharply
Interest rate hikes negatively impact equipment financing

narratives.name: Household & Personal Products Watchlist
narratives.thesis: This sector is on watch for how persistent inflation and changing consumer preferences impact demand and pricing power for household and personal products.
watchFor: Raw material costs decrease significantly
Consumer brand loyalty strengthens despite price increases
New product innovations drive unexpected sales growth

narratives.name: Other Industrial Metals & Mining Watchlist
narratives.thesis: The industrial metals and mining sector is on watch, with demand tied to global manufacturing and infrastructure spending, and supply dynamics for critical materials.
watchFor: China's industrial production accelerates significantly
New trade tariffs on industrial metals
Major new mining projects come online

Technology.thesis: The AI capex cycle continues to be the dominant driver, with strong demand for chips and infrastructure. However, rising bond yields pose a potential headwind for growth stock valuations.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings – would crack the AI demand thesis
10Y yield breaks above 5% – kills the duration bid that powers software multiples
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM – forces a hawkish Fed repricing

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer spending remains under pressure from high prices, particularly for essentials like gasoline, impacting discretionary retail. However, specific niches like e-commerce and residential construction show resilience or potential.
watchFor: Core PCE inflation drops below 2.5% YoY – could signal consumer relief
Retail sales data shows unexpected strength across categories
Consumer confidence index drops sharply – indicating further spending cuts

Communication Services.thesis: Digital advertising and content consumption remain strong, driven by platform growth and user engagement, with new social media platforms gaining traction.
watchFor: Major advertising agencies report significant spending cuts from clients
Subscription streaming services report net subscriber losses
Regulatory actions targeting large tech platforms intensify

Industrials.thesis: Aerospace and defense spending remains a tailwind due to geopolitical tensions, while freight and logistics face ongoing operational challenges. Heavy machinery is on watch for economic shifts.
watchFor: De-escalation of major geopolitical conflicts – reducing defense budgets
Global trade volumes show significant contraction – impacting logistics
PMI manufacturing index drops below 50 for several months

Healthcare.thesis: The GLP-1 obesity drug wave continues to drive significant growth for leaders, but the broader healthcare sector faces regulatory scrutiny and pricing pressures, particularly for generic pharma and medical devices.
watchFor: New GLP-1 competitors enter the market with superior efficacy/safety
Major regulatory changes impacting drug pricing or PBM negotiations
Healthcare utilization rates decline unexpectedly across the board

Financials.thesis: Credit services show strength driven by consumer spending, but the broader banking sector faces headwinds from rising interest rates and potential credit quality concerns, while asset managers navigate volatile markets.
watchFor: Fed signals clear path to rate cuts – boosting duration assets
Significant increase in corporate or consumer loan defaults
New financial regulations impacting bank profitability

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Discount stores continue to benefit from cost-conscious consumers, but overall consumer defensive spending is being impacted by persistent inflation, especially for household goods.
watchFor: Core CPI drops significantly below 3% YoY – reducing consumer need for discount stores
Wage growth significantly outpaces inflation – boosting discretionary spending
Major retailers report unexpected inventory build-ups

Utilities.thesis: The utilities sector is mixed, with independent power producers potentially benefiting from demand growth, while renewable utilities face challenges from rising interest rates and project financing costs.
watchFor: Interest rates decline significantly – reducing financing costs for capital-intensive projects
New government incentives for renewable energy projects
Unexpected regulatory changes impacting utility rate structures

Basic Materials.thesis: The industrial metals and mining sector is mixed, with demand influenced by global industrial activity and supply chain dynamics, particularly for critical materials.
watchFor: Global manufacturing PMI shows sustained expansion
Significant new supply comes online for key industrial metals
Geopolitical tensions disrupt critical mineral supply chains

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are mixed, with gold and silver acting as inflation hedges and safe havens, but facing headwinds from rising real yields and a strong dollar.
watchFor: Real yields turn negative – boosting non-yielding assets
Significant escalation of geopolitical tensions – increasing safe-haven demand
Dollar index (DXY) strengthens significantly – creating headwinds for dollar-denominated commodities
